summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Data Entry page theming and functionality. Successfully verified Layout integration, theming consistency, and responsive design. All 7 tabs functional, proper slate color scheme implemented, and mobile responsiveness working correctly.

ui_bugs.issue: HTML hydration warnings: <span> cannot be child of <option> and <select>

integration_issues.issue: Authentication session expires frequently, causing redirects to login page

design_issues.issue: Could not thoroughly test dark mode functionality due to session persistence issues

passed_tests: Data Entry page loads at /data-entry route
Layout component integration (sidebar and header visible)
Data Entry link in sidebar navigates correctly
Page title 'REAL PROPERTY DATA ENTRY' displays correctly
Subtitle 'Tubay - FAAS/TDN Management' displays correctly
All 7 tabs present and switchable (Property Information, Assessment, Reference, Signatories/Memorandum, Other Property Information, Previous TDNs, Tag Dec. Sheet)
Property Search section with PIN and location search functional
View JSON Data button present and styled correctly
Property Information form displays with 3-column desktop layout
Form sections (Property Info, Owner/Admin, Boundaries) display correctly
Responsive grid works (3 cols desktop, 1 col mobile confirmed)
Blue headers use blue-600/blue-500 styling
Form inputs have proper slate backgrounds (bg-slate-50/bg-slate-800)
Consistent rounded-xl corners throughout interface
Slate color scheme properly implemented (slate-900/slate-100 for headings)
PIN search input functional
Municipality dropdown functional
Date inputs accept values
Text inputs accept values
Floating settings button present
Mobile viewport displays single-column layout correctly
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix React hydration warnings in FormSelect components by removing nested span elements inside option tags. Consider implementing more robust session management to prevent frequent authentication redirects during testing.
success_percentage: frontend: 85% - Most functionality working correctly with minor issues
